    B

    basicLoopPrinter(int) - Method in class main.Loop
    It prints the selections: see notification, see profile, exit, go back.
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.Comic
    It prints the product's info when seen individually
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.Figurine
    It prints the product's info when seen individually
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.Game
    It prints the product's info when seen individually
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.Pack
    It prints the pack's info when seen individually
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.Product
    It prints the product's info when seen individually
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.SecondHandProduct
    It prints the product's info
    bigPrintInfo() - Method in class product.StoreProduct
    It prints the product's info when seen individually
    browseCartPacks() - Method in class main.UnregisteredClientLoop
    It allows an unregistered client to see their cart's packs
    browseCartProducts() - Method in class main.UnregisteredClientLoop
    It allows an unregistered client to browse their cart's products
    browseNotifications() - Method in class user.Employee
    The notifications of the employee
    browseNotifications() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
    The notifications of the client
    browseSecondHandProduct() - Method in class search.Searcher
    Retrieves all second-hand products sorted alphabetically.
    BrowseSecondHandProducts - Class in search
    This class provides functionality to browse and retrieve second-hand products available in the store.
    BrowseSecondHandProducts() - Constructor for class search.BrowseSecondHandProducts
    Constructs a BrowseSecondHandProducts object and initializes the list of second-hand products from the store.
    browseSimilarProducts() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
    It allows the registered client to browse recommendations on products imilar to those they bought previously
    buy() - Method in class user.RegisteredClient
    Makes the buying process of the cart
    buy() - Method in class user.UnregisteredClient
    Makes the buying process of the cart
